name: @forgeax/app-learn-render-6-pbr-2-ibl-irradiance
description: learn-render LearnOpenGL section 6.pbr 2.ibl-irradiance -- IBL diffuse irradiance sphere matrix via @forgeax/engine-app + Skylight component.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime size already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: OOS-11 fps anchor stays on hello-triangle; per-app fps drift is not gated for learn-render examples

bench.reason: pixel-parity bench drives parity-forgeax vs parity-threejs; learn-render entries land as bench:pixel-parity placeholders only

gate.reason: smoke driver passes locally (macOS dawn meanAbsDelta < 0.05) but reference PNG was baked on macOS GPU; Linux dawn in CI drifts past the 0.05 threshold. Cross-GPU pixel parity at this tightness is environment-sensitive — relaxing the threshold or re-baking per-environment is a feat-scope follow-up. The smoke command itself is still runnable via `pnpm -F @forgeax/app-learn-render-6-pbr-2-ibl-irradiance smoke` for local verification.

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; LearnOpenGL section-6.2 IBL irradiance demo
